ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "saler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller fulfilling the order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Cancelled, Completed) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the order in terms of number of products */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Gateway used for payment (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_saler_id FOREIGN KEY ("saler_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for security */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, seller) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "saler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who owns the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "product_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_saler_id FOREIGN KEY ("saler_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Completed, Failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used for shipping (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_provider" TEXT /* Provider used for shipping (e.g., USPS, UPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_response" TEXT /* Response to the review from the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order that was cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cancellation occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation */,
  "cancellation_reason_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reason for cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed) */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "promotion_target" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., all users, specific users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the loyalty program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points accumulated by the user */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the loyalty program (e.g., Silver, Gold, Platinum) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to reach the next level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided with the feedback (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the support team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
